shellCommands.command: pwd && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src/test | head -80 && rg -n "openOnClick|stopPropagation|document|addEventListener|click" src/components/Tooltip src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js

find src/components/Tooltip src/test -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -100; grep -RInE "openOnClick|stopPropagation|addEventListener|document|click" src/components/Tooltip src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js | head -200

git status --short && git log -5 --oneline -- src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && grep -RIn "addDelegatedEventListener" src package.json README.md | head -100 && grep -RIn "capture" src/components src/test | head -100

apply_patch <<'PATCH' *** Begin Patch *** Update File: src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts @@ const handlersByType = new Map>() + +// Click handlers need to run before an anchor can stop the event from bubbling. +const delegatedEventCapture = (eventType: string): boolean => eventType === 'click' @@ set = new Set() handlersByType.set(eventType, set) - document.addEventListener(eventType, dispatch) + document.addEventListener(eventType, dispatch, delegatedEventCapture(eventType)) @@ handlersByType.delete(eventType) - document.removeEventListener(eventType, dispatch) + document.removeEventListener(eventType, dispatch, delegatedEventCapture(eventType)) @@ handlersByType.forEach((_handlers, eventType) => { - document.removeEventListener(eventType, dispatch) + document.removeEventListener(eventType, dispatch, delegatedEventCapture(eventType)) }) *** Update File: src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js @@ test('opens on click when click is the configured trigger', async () => { @@ expect(tooltip).toHaveTextContent('Click Only Test') }) + + test('opens on click when the anchor stops propagation', async () => { + await renderAndFlush( + <> + event.stopPropagation()} + > + Click Me + + + , + ) + + fireEvent.click(screen.getByText('Click Me')) + await flushMicrotasks() + + const tooltip = await waitForTooltip('stopped-click-test') + expect(tooltip).toHaveTextContent('Stopped Click Test') + }) test('stops showing after scroll and resize global close events', async () => { *** End Patch PATCH node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js --runInBand

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for name in ('src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts', 'src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js'):
    p = Path(name)
    data = p.read_bytes()
    if not data.endswith(b'\n'):
        p.write_bytes(data + b'\n')
PY
npm run build
